title: ARCHIVED – Departmental Plan 2022-2023 - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED – Departmental Plan 2022-2023

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
Subsequent to the tabling in Parliament and online publication of IRCC’s 2022–23 Departmental Plan, it was found that the target for the number of temporary workers who fill labour market needs for which Canadians are unavailable was incorrect. The target for this indicator has been corrected from 80,000 – 100,000 to 80,000 – 120,000, to both the PDF and the HTML versions of the document to ensure complete and transparent information.
- Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada Departmental Plan 2022-2023 PDF Version (PDF, 2 MB)
